name: kung_fu.exe
description: A small training package that teaches hash output to land a little cleaner.

name: core fork
description: Spin up a temporary execution lane and lend the machine 32 extra cores.

name: bot swarm
description: Start 256 temporary bots that raise every production calculation while the program is running.

name: thread daemon
description: Keep RAM background tasks awake between visible pulses.

name: core resolver
description: Bias the scheduler toward core growth while the program is running.

name: I/O broker
description: Let taps and threads share a hotter queue.

name: wide fork
description: Borrow a wider execution lane and lend the machine 96 extra cores.

name: thread swarm
description: RAM schedules background tasks in dense overlapping waves.

name: tap JIT
description: Compile repeated taps into a short-lived hot path.

name: core kernel
description: Run a kernel that treats core growth as the primary process.

name: scheduler overdrive
description: Let every visible process steal time from the dark scheduler.
